title: Listening - Part 3
instructions: Complete the notes with a word or short phrase.

content.speaker: Emma
content.audio_script:
Hello everyone. My name’s Emma, and today I’m going to tell you about a summer photography course.

The project first started at the [1]city college[/1], where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on [2]Friday evenings[/2], because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring [3]digital cameras[/3] or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby [4]park café[/4] together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an [5]online gallery[/5], which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is [6]working outdoors[/6], because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.

dialogue.speaker: emma
dialogue.text:
Hello everyone. My name’s Emma, and today I’m going to tell you about a summer photography course.

The project first started at the city college, where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on Friday evenings, because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring digital cameras or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby park café together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an online gallery, which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is working outdoors, because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.
